overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player moves from a busy commercial street with large digital billboards into darker underpasses and back alleys, showcasing the game's cyberpunk aesthetic with vibrant neon signage and dense urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital billboards

events.description: pedestrians cross the path from left to right in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past neon-lit storefronts and large digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: person in red pants walking across the street from left to right

entered.detail: large circular green neon sign with pink text reading MASAMI MARKET mounted on building corner
tall building-mounted screen displaying advertisements with a woman in purple clothing
multi-story brutalist concrete building with horizontal window slits
small vendor booth with blue canopy and metal fencing on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a neon-lit commercial street at night, passing the prominent Masami Market sign and large digital billboards. The concrete office building looms on the left while pedestrians cross the street ahead, and the camera moves steadily forward through the sparse crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking garage and underpass beneath commercial buildings

events.description: enters covered parking structure from open street, neon signs fade from view
lighting shifts from bright neon to dim artificial overhead fluorescent lights

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass beneath the commercial complex, moving between concrete pillars

entered.detail: multi-level parking garage with orange and teal painted concrete walls and overhead walkways
massive cylindrical concrete columns supporting the overhead building structure
enclosed glass walkway connecting buildings above the parking area
several vehicles parked along the sides of the underpass in shadows

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dimly lit covered parking structure beneath the commercial complex. Massive concrete pillars line the path while parked cars sit in shadows. The bright neon of the street gives way to muted artificial lighting as the camera moves deeper into the underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: service alley with vending machines and stair access between buildings

events.description: begins ascending the concrete stairs flanked by vending machines

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete staircase between the teal glass tower and graffiti-covered wall, passing purple vending machines

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward between buildings
three brightly lit purple and red vending machines with warning symbols at the base of the stairs
tall modern building with teal-tinted reflective glass windows
concrete wall with colorful spray paint and Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow service corridor toward a concrete staircase. Purple vending machines glow brightly at the stair base against the teal glass tower. The camera ascends the stairs, leaving the parking structure behind, with graffiti-covered walls on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with neon-lit storefronts and overhead cables

events.description: exits stairwell into narrow back alley with different architectural style and renewed neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alleyway passing wooden crates and blue neon signs, approaching a distant figure

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt standing near wooden crates at the end of the alley

entered.detail: tight corridor formed by adjacent commercial buildings with fire escapes and metal shutters
building front with bright blue neon strip lighting and large glass windows
dense tangle of black cables and wires strung between buildings above the alley
stacked wooden boxes and pallets blocking part of the alleyway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs into a narrow back alley illuminated by blue neon lights. The space is confined by adjacent buildings with fire escapes, while overhead electrical wires crisscross above. Wooden crates block part of the path ahead where a figure stands in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial thoroughfare into the claustrophobic depths of a city's industrial underbelly. It begins by gliding past large digital billboards and the Masami Market sign on a busy street, moving through a sparse crowd beneath looming office buildings. As the camera leaves the open road, the scene shifts into a dimly lit covered parking structure where bright neon gives way to muted artificial lighting and massive concrete pillars. The path then narrows into a service corridor, passing glowing purple vending machines before ascending a graffiti-covered staircase toward a teal glass tower. Finally, the camera emerges into a confined back alley illuminated by blue neon, moving under a web of electrical wires and past wooden crates toward a distant figure.
